mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.user_id, n.from_user_id, n.type, n.title, n.content, n.related_id, n.is_read, n.create_time, cu.nick_name as from_user_name, cu.avatar as from_user_avatar FROM content_notification n LEFT JOIN content_user cu ON n.from_user_id = cu.user_id WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY n.create_time DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content_notification (user_id, from_user_id, type, title, content, related_id, is_read, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{fromUserId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{relatedId}, '0', sysdate())
mapper.update: UPDATE content_notification SET is_read = '1' WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE content_notification SET is_read = '1' WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = '0'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM content_notification WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
